title: mentha × gracilis
intro: Mentha × gracilis, also known as ginger mint, is a hybrid plant of the mint family, resulting from the cross between Mentha canadensis and Mentha arvensis. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Mentha × gracilis include its ability to alleviate nausea, improve digestion, and provide relief from headaches and stress. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed orally or used topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
